name: Agent
description: AI Agent backend — LLM providers (Azure AI Foundry, Gemini), generic MMGIS tool registry, and REST routes exposed at /api/agent.

descriptionFull.title: Provides a pluggable AI agent backend for MMGIS. Supports Azure AI Foundry and Google Gemini as LLM providers. Exposes a REST endpoint (POST /api/agent) consumed by the AgentChat frontend tool. Includes a tool registry for map operations (layer toggle, opacity, zoom, analysis, export, etc.) and Python-based raster analysis utilities.

example.LLM_PROVIDER: (string) 'azure' or 'gemini' — selects the active LLM provider

envs.WITH_AGENT: (string) Set to 'true' to enable the Agent plugin; any other value disables it
envs.LLM_PROVIDER: (string) 'azure' or 'gemini' — selects the active LLM provider [default 'azure']
envs.AZURE_AI_ENDPOINT: (string) Azure AI Foundry project endpoint URL
envs.AZURE_AI_API_KEY: (string) Azure AI Foundry API key (used when AZURE_CLIENT_ID is not set)
envs.AZURE_CLIENT_ID: (string) Azure Managed Identity / Service Principal client ID (alternative to API key)
envs.AZURE_AGENT_MODEL: (string) Model deployment name in Azure AI Foundry [default 'gpt-4o']
envs.MMGIS_PYTHON: (string) Path to Python executable for raster analysis [default 'python3']
envs.FROZON_DEFAULT_MISSION: (string) Default mission name used when none is supplied in requests

components.name: LLM Provider
components.description: Select the AI provider to use for agent responses.

author: yunks128
